title: Tao Te Ching 16: Returning to the Root
description: Attain the utmost emptiness. Hold firm to stillness. All things flourish and return to the root.
introduction: Attain the utmost emptiness. Hold firm to stillness. All things flourish and return to the root.

translation.text: Attain the utmost emptiness. Hold firm to stillness. The ten thousand things rise and fall while the Self watches their return.
